Cartoon

Copied

During the Paris Olympics, some U.S. media and agencies kept hyping up the issue of doping to target China. In recent years, the U.S. has been constantly using legislation, funding, and diplomatic pressure to politicize and weaponize anti-doping work. The doping testing, to level the playing field and protect clean sports, has otherwise become a political weapon of the U.S. to contain other countries.

(To submit cartoons and share story ideas or feedback on ourcartoon page, please contact us atcartoon_opinions@cgtn.com)
